_doc: Phase 5 Plan 05-06 — F21934D4 turn-rolling regression canary. Inspector captures Ze=0.23 at turn 3; turn 4's user text moves to a different circuit's R1. The pre-Phase-5 legacy path would re-ask about Ze at turn 4 (the turn-N capture is lost when the conversation window rolls past). Phase 5's gated + prompt path must emit ZERO ask_user for the rolled value. Fixture proves the assembled Phase 5 pipeline (gate wrapper + budget + restrained + filled-slots-shadow) is happy with a clean transcript that never trips the over-ask surface — i.e. the gates do NOT manufacture a problem out of a clean run.
_requirement: STT-04 canary — Phase 5 gate ensures the Phase 7 STT-04 fixture will pass before it runs. Phase 5 SC #8 aggregate: 0 successful asks contributes to median/p95 head.
transcript_summary: Turn 1: 'Ze is point two three'. Turn 2: 'Final reading on circuit one'. Turn 3: 'Confirm circuit one zero point eight'. Turn 4: 'R1 plus R2 on circuit two is point one five'.
